---
title: "Pre-Workshop Setup"
subtitle: "FED-ETARC Workshop: Structural Equation Modeling"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
---

Workshop attendees are encouraged to complete the setup steps on this page before arriving at the workshop. If you run into trouble, email the instructor or arrive early to the workshop.

---

## Recommended Setup Options

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Option 1: Posit Cloud (RStudio in the cloud)

- Create a free account at https://posit.cloud/
- Open the Posit Cloud project link: https://posit.cloud/content/12313416
- Click "Save a Permanent Copy"
    * ![](posit_cloud_save.png)

## Option 2: Local Installation

### Step 1: Install R

Install R **4.5 or later**: <https://cloud.r-project.org/>

### Step 2: Install an IDE

You can use either **RStudio** or **Positron** (the new R IDE from Posit).

- RStudio: <https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/>
- Positron: <https://positron.posit.co/>

### Step 3: Install R Packages

Open R (or Positron/RStudio) and run:

```r
install.packages(c("lavaan", "semPlot", "tidyverse"))
```

This may take a few minutes. You only need to do this once.

:::

## Verify Your Setup

Run the following code to confirm everything is installed and working:

```r
# Check R version
stopifnot(getRversion() >= "4.4")

# Check packages load correctly
library(lavaan)
library(semPlot)
library(tidyverse)

# Fit a quick test model
model <- '
  # Measurement model
  visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
  speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9
'
fit <- cfa(model, data = HolzingerSwineford1939)
summary(fit, fit.measures = TRUE)
```

If no errors appear and you see model output, **you are ready for the workshop!** 🎉

## Workshop Materials

Slides, exercises, and datasets will be available on the [workshop website](index.qmd) before and after the session.
